title: StudioDash Automation & Sync
description: Understand how StudioDash keeps your data up to date, monitors provider health, and helps you stay informed across every connected service.
summary: StudioDash makes synchronisation transparent, showing when data was updated, the health of each provider, and what needs your attention.

featureShowcases.heading: Stay in Control of Your Data
featureShowcases.summary: StudioDash clearly shows the status of every connected provider so you always know how current your data is.
featureShowcases.body: Rather than hiding unavailable information, StudioDash explains why it isn't available. Whether a provider needs configuring, is waiting for fresh data, or has encountered an issue, you'll always have the information you need to understand what's happening.
bullets: View provider health and synchronisation status at a glance.
Clearly identify providers that need attention or setup.
Future automation features will build on this foundation as they become available.

image.caption: Monitor every connected provider from one dashboard.

sections.heading: Clear Synchronisation Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is designed to make synchronisation easy to understand. Instead of wondering whether your information is current, you can immediately see when each provider was last checked, last updated, and whether any action is required.

Connected providers remain visible even when no data is available, making it clear whether a service is waiting for setup, still synchronising, or simply has no information to display for the selected period.
bullets: See when each provider was last checked and last synchronised.
Understand the difference between manual refreshes and scheduled updates.
Keep connected providers visible, even when no data is currently available.

sections.heading: Provider Health
paragraphs: Provider Health gives you an instant overview of every connected service. Clear status labels make it easy to identify healthy providers, integrations that need attention, configuration issues, and planned future integrations.
Rather than relying on technical messages, StudioDash uses simple, consistent status information to help you understand what action, if any, is required.
bullets: Attention Required – Configuration or data needs review.
Error – Synchronisation or provider communication failed.
Not Configured – The provider hasn't been connected yet.
Planned – Integration is planned for a future release.

sections.heading: Manual Refresh & Cached Data
paragraphs: StudioDash makes it easy to refresh provider data whenever you need the latest information. Individual providers can be refreshed independently, while a separate refresh option updates every connected provider.
Cached data is used to improve performance and provide historical reporting without unnecessarily contacting external services every time the app starts.
bullets: View cache health and historical coverage where available.
Understand the difference between no data and provider errors.
Use cached history for faster reporting across longer time periods.

sections.heading: Automation Roadmap
paragraphs: StudioDash is being built with automation in mind. Future releases are planned to introduce scheduled reports, intelligent summaries, forecasting, recommendations, and other time-saving features.
The long-term goal is to reduce repetitive dashboard checking while helping developers identify what matters most across their apps and services.
